content.explanation:
**Passive Voice Part 2 — Advanced Passive Structures:**

**Continuing from Day 49 — More Tenses & Patterns:**

| Tense | Active | Passive |
|-------|--------|---------|
| Past Perfect | Had finished | Had been finished |
| Present Continuous | Is doing | Is being done |
| Past Continuous | Was doing | Was being done |
| Modal (Can/Should/Must) | Can do | Can be done |

**Passive with Modals:**
🇮🇳 यह काम किया जा सकता है।
🇬🇧 This work **can be done**.

🇮🇳 यह नहीं करना चाहिए।
🇬🇧 This **should not be done**.

🇮🇳 इसे तुरंत fix करना होगा।
🇬🇧 This **must be fixed** immediately.

**Double Object Sentences:**
Active: "Someone gave him the award."
Passive Option 1: "He **was given** the award."
Passive Option 2: "The award **was given** to him."
rules: Past Perfect Passive: had been + V3
Present Continuous Passive: is/am/are being + V3
Past Continuous Passive: was/were being + V3
Modal Passive: modal + be + V3 (can be done, should be fixed)
Double object passive: prefer person as subject ("He was given the book.")
"By" + agent = optional — omit when unknown or obvious
content.memoryTrick:
**Continuous Passive = IS/WAS/WERE + BEING + V3**
**Modal Passive = Modal + BE + V3**
Trick: जहाँ भी -ing था, वहाँ 'being' लगा दो;
जहाँ modal था, वहाँ 'be' लगा दो!

examples.hindi: Report तैयार की जा रही थी।
यह form ऑनलाइन भरा जा सकता है।
examples.english: This form can be filled online.

examples.hindi: Mobile phone class में use नहीं करना चाहिए।
examples.english: Mobile phones should not be used in class.

examples.hindi: काम शुरू होने से पहले plan तैयार हो चुका था।
examples.english: The plan had been finalized before the work started.

mistakes.wrong: The car is being repaired currently.
mistakes.why: 'Currently' already implies ongoing action; both fine but avoid redundancy
Modal passive: should be + V3 (done, not do)

mistakes.correct: He was selected. / He has been selected.
mistakes.why: Was + been is incorrect — was (Past Passive) OR has been (Present Perfect Passive)

speakingTips: Progress updates: 'The project is being reviewed by the management team.'
Policies: 'Smoking is not allowed inside the building.'
News: 'Three suspects have been arrested in connection with the case.'

vocabulary.example: The results will be announced tomorrow.
A new bridge is being constructed.
Funds have been allocated for the project.

practice.hindi: एक नई इमारत बनाई जा रही है।
practice.english: A new building is being built.
alternatives: a new building is being constructed.
practice.hint: is being + past participle (present continuous passive)

practice.hindi: वह सड़क मरम्मत की जा रही है।
practice.english: That road is being repaired.
alternatives: the road is being fixed.

practice.hindi: यह दवाई दुनिया भर में बनाई जा रही है।
practice.english: This medicine is being manufactured worldwide.
alternatives: this medicine is being made all over the world.

practice.hindi: एक नई पॉलिसी बनाई जा रही है।
practice.english: A new policy is being formed.
alternatives: a new policy is being formulated.

practice.hindi: क्या खाना बनाया जा रहा है?
practice.english: Is food being cooked?
alternatives: is the meal being prepared?

practice.hindi: इमारत पिछले साल बनाई जा रही थी।
practice.english: The building was being constructed last year.
alternatives: the building was being built the previous year.
practice.hint: was being + past participle (past continuous passive)

practice.hindi: गाना रिकॉर्ड किया जा रहा था।
practice.english: The song was being recorded.
alternatives: the track was being recorded.

practice.hindi: परीक्षा के प्रश्न तैयार किए जा रहे थे।
practice.english: The exam questions were being prepared.
alternatives: the test papers were being set.

practice.hindi: यह रिपोर्ट पहले ही जमा की जा चुकी है।
practice.english: This report has already been submitted.
alternatives: the report has been handed in already.
practice.hint: has been + past participle (present perfect passive)

practice.hindi: मेरी गाड़ी ठीक कर दी गई है।
practice.english: My car has been repaired.
alternatives: my car has been fixed.

practice.hindi: दरवाज़ा बंद कर दिया गया है।
practice.english: The door has been closed.
alternatives: the door has been shut.

practice.hindi: क्या चिट्ठी भेजी जा चुकी है?
practice.english: Has the letter been sent?
alternatives: has the mail been dispatched?

practice.hindi: सभी तैयारियाँ पूरी की जा चुकी हैं।
practice.english: All arrangements have been completed.
alternatives: all preparations have been made.

practice.hindi: चोर को पहले ही गिरफ्तार किया जा चुका है।
practice.english: The thief has already been arrested.
alternatives: the criminal has been caught already.

practice.hindi: नए नियम लागू किए जा चुके हैं।
practice.english: The new rules have been implemented.
alternatives: new regulations have been put in place.

practice.hindi: यह काम कल किया जाएगा।
practice.english: This work will be done tomorrow.
alternatives: this task will be completed tomorrow.

practice.hindi: पुरस्कार अगले हफ्ते दिए जाएँगे।
practice.english: Awards will be given next week.
alternatives: prizes will be distributed next week.

practice.hindi: नई ब्रांच अगले महीने खोली जाएगी।
practice.english: The new branch will be opened next month.
alternatives: the new office will be launched next month.

practice.hindi: यह काम जल्दी होना चाहिए।
practice.english: This work should be done quickly.
alternatives: this task must be completed fast.

practice.hindi: यह दरवाज़ा बंद होना चाहिए।
practice.english: This door should be kept closed.
alternatives: the door must remain closed.

practice.hindi: यह रहस्य किसी को नहीं बताया जाना चाहिए।
practice.english: This secret should not be told to anyone.
alternatives: this secret must not be revealed.

practice.hindi: मरीज़ का खयाल रखा जाना चाहिए।
practice.english: The patient should be taken care of.
alternatives: the patient must be looked after.

practice.hindi: इस गाने को लाखों लोगों ने सुना है।
practice.english: This song has been heard by millions of people.
alternatives: millions have heard this song.

practice.hindi: वह जीत बहुत याद की जाती है।
practice.english: That victory is remembered greatly.
alternatives: that win is deeply cherished.

practice.hindi: यह प्रश्न अभी तक हल नहीं किया गया है।
practice.english: This question has not been solved yet.
alternatives: this question hasn't been answered yet.
